message:
fix(storage): remove manual transaction batching in writer loop for per-command durability

The writer loop was wrapping multiple WriteCommands in an explicit
BEGIN/COMMIT transaction to amortize journal overhead. However, each
command resolves a caller-facing oneshot from dispatch_write_command(),
so individual commands could report success before a later COMMIT
failure, turning a durability failure into a false Ok.

Remove the manual transaction wrapper and stay in SQLite's per-statement
autocommit mode. Remove is_control_command() helper (no longer needed
since there are no transactions to commit before control commands).
Update doc comments to explain the durability rationale.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
